creator: marcarianalexandru@gmail.com
text: well PHP 8.1.7 has a vulnerability ( https://cve.mitre.org/cgi-bin/cvename.cgi?name=CVE-2022-31627 ) that is fixed in 8.1.8. ( https://github.com/php/php-src/commit/ca6d511fa54b34d5b75bf120a86482a1b9e1e686 ). usually there are no new features in the 8.1.x branch for example. just bug fixes, security patches, etc.
